description: A packet capture (and sending) library for Microsoft Windows.
pre_install: if (!(is_admin)) { error "$app requires admin rights to $cmd"; break }
Write-Host 'THIS APPLICATION INSTALLER HAS NO SILENT INSTALLATION SWITCH, A INSTALLATION PROMPT WILL APPEAR IN A FEW MOMENTS.'
pre_uninstall: if (!(is_admin)) { error "$app requires admin rights to $cmd"; break }
notes: 【主要功能】: Windows平台的数据包捕获和发送库，支持WinPcap兼容API
【适用场景】: 网络分析、数据包捕获、网络调试
【技术特点】: Windows内核级网络驱动，支持混杂模式，兼容WinPcap
